description: Feature: during multi-model deployment, rotating a model carries that rotation over to the FOLLOWING model instead of snapping back to the default enemy-facing. Drives the real player path: begin_deploy a 3-model Custodian Guard unit, rotate the first model's ghost +90 degrees via six real 'E' keypresses (rotate_right = +15 each), place it, then assert the ghost for the SECOND model starts at that same +90 rotation (NOT the default facing). Repeats for the third model. Proves the fix in DeploymentController._update_ghost_for_next_model / _initial_deploy_rotation_for.

steps.script:
var dc = tree.root.get_node("Main").deployment_controller
if dc.ghost_sprite == null:
	return "NO_GHOST"
return abs(dc.ghost_sprite.get_base_rotation() - BoardState.get_default_facing_for_player(1)) < 0.001

var dc = tree.root.get_node("Main").deployment_controller
var want = BoardState.get_default_facing_for_player(1) + PI/2.0
return abs(dc.ghost_sprite.get_base_rotation() - want) < 0.02

var dc = tree.root.get_node("Main").deployment_controller
var z = BoardState.get_deployment_zone_for_player(1)
var c = Vector2.ZERO
for p in z:
	c += p
c /= float(z.size())
dc.try_place_at(c + Vector2(-90, 0))
return dc.temp_positions[0] != null

var dc = tree.root.get_node("Main").deployment_controller
var want = BoardState.get_default_facing_for_player(1) + PI/2.0
return abs(dc.temp_rotations[0] - want) < 0.02

var dc = tree.root.get_node("Main").deployment_controller
if dc.ghost_sprite == null:
	return "NO_GHOST"
var ghost_rot = dc.ghost_sprite.get_base_rotation()
var carried = abs(ghost_rot - dc.temp_rotations[0]) < 0.001
var not_default = abs(ghost_rot - BoardState.get_default_facing_for_player(1)) > 0.1
return carried and not_default

var dc = tree.root.get_node("Main").deployment_controller
var z = BoardState.get_deployment_zone_for_player(1)
var c = Vector2.ZERO
for p in z:
	c += p
c /= float(z.size())
dc.try_place_at(c)
return dc.temp_positions[1] != null

var dc = tree.root.get_node("Main").deployment_controller
if dc.ghost_sprite == null:
	return "NO_GHOST"
return abs(dc.ghost_sprite.get_base_rotation() - dc.temp_rotations[0]) < 0.001

var dc = tree.root.get_node("Main").deployment_controller
var z = BoardState.get_deployment_zone_for_player(1)
var c = Vector2.ZERO
for p in z:
	c += p
c /= float(z.size())
dc.try_place_at(c + Vector2(90, 0))
return dc.temp_positions[2] != null
